title: Avoid storing non-serializable objects in HttpSession instances
description: HttpSession instances can be serialized and stored on disk during passivation and activation. Storing non-serializable objects in HttpSession instances can lead to serialization failures.
recommendation: Ensure that only serializable objects are stored in HttpSession instances.
impact: Potential serialization failures and security vulnerabilities

checks.message: Ensure that only serializable objects are stored in HttpSession instances.
